title: sida echinocarpa
intro: Sida echinocarpa, also known as the spiny sida or prickly sida, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant contains compounds like flavonoids and alkaloids, which contribute to its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Sida echinocarpa can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of illnesses.
